blockingIssues.description: crates/h7cad-native-dwg/src/resolver.rs semantic_entity() converts every parsed entity into EntityData::Point, so resolved outputs lose outward TEXT vs MTEXT vs INSERT distinctions required by VAL-HARDEN-012.
INSERT entities are materialized without reference/link data, so outward-facing resolved surfaces do not preserve type-specific relationships required by VAL-HARDEN-013.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the dwg-parser-worker skill so it does not direct workers to .factory/library/architecture.md as authoritative DWG parser guidance unless that file is replaced with DWG-specific architecture notes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for dwg-parser-resolver-expanded-type-materialization-contract found .factory/skills/dwg-parser-worker/SKILL.md instructs workers to read .factory/library/architecture.md, but the current architecture doc describes the DXF native migration mission and explicitly says DWG parser/runtime rollout is out of scope.
